roa.docketEntryComment: THE COURT ORDERS A GENERAL ORDER OF RESTITUTION AS TO THE NAMED VICTIMSAND THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION OVER RESTITUTION IN THIS MATTER

/CAL SENTENCE/TWS/CH1 ISS CPROB PROB 3 Y PJ 10 D/CTS 10/VF2 150/WS/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/SA2:CROWN HOTEL 528 VALENCIAST, SF CA/SAORD4:50 YARDS/SAORD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS NO LONGER SUBJECT TO ANY SHERIFF'S ELECTRONIC MONITORING CONDITION/30    CAPD MISD REST REPORT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED  TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT'S RESTITUTION UNITFOR DETERMINATION OF MISDEMEANOR VICTIM RESTITUTION,/RESTRPT:05-11-20/CONTD:MISDEMEANOR RESTITUTION REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30//DOP/

/CAL:RETURN ON SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLYWITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:MAINTAIN DATE OF 02-20-20/DOP/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/X:LOVE WAIVER/BWDNC/ORNAS/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD//CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONT:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/BWDNC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX:01-04-19/987,2/ACM/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/MISDRED1:COUNT 1/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PER WVS CONST &CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV RTS:1/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
